case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RAMOS, MARCELINO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARCELINO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-15-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-01-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARCELINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-03-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-13-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, MARCELINO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
